title: DEWALT 20V MAX Cordless Drill / Driver Kit (DCD771C2)
summary: The DEWALT DCD771C2 is the gold standard entry-level cordless drill for homeowners and DIY enthusiasts. Our research suggests it consistently outperforms similarly priced competitors in torque delivery, battery life, and overall build quality.
pros: Powerful 300 UWO motor — handles almost any drilling or driving task
Comes with 2 batteries for uninterrupted workflow
Lightweight at just 3.6 lbs — reduces fatigue
Compatible with entire 20V MAX battery ecosystem
cons: Doesn't include a carrying bag (just a kitbox)
No brushless motor — slightly less efficient than premium models
Chuck quality is adequate but not exceptional
Battery charger is basic — no fast-charge capability
bestFor: First-time homeowners building their tool collection
Weekend DIY projects and basic home repairs
Those who want to invest in DEWALT's 20V MAX battery platform
Anyone who needs reliable performance at a mid-range price
verdict: The DEWALT DCD771C2 is the drill we recommend to virtually everyone who asks what to buy first. It's powerful enough for most home tasks, backed by DEWALT's legendary reliability, and priced fairly. Our research confirms it's an exceptional value.
